name: Civil & Applied Mechanics Department
overview: The Civil & Applied Mechanics Department is one of the pioneering departments at GP Palanpur, established in 1984. With a dedicated team of 13 faculty members, the department offers the Diploma in Civil Engineering program. The department is equipped with state-of-the-art laboratories and provides comprehensive education in structural design, construction techniques, and infrastructure development.
achievements: NBA Accreditation for Diploma in Civil Engineering (Valid till 2027)
Over 40 years of excellence in civil engineering education
Strong industry collaborations and placement record

name: Electrical Department
overview: The Electrical Department, established in 1984, is a cornerstone of technical education at GP Palanpur. With 10 experienced faculty members, the department offers the Diploma in Electrical Engineering program. The department focuses on power systems, electrical machines, renewable energy, and control systems, preparing students for diverse careers in the electrical sector.
achievements: NBA Accreditation for Diploma in Electrical Engineering (Valid till 2027)
Active industry partnerships with power sector companies
Dedicated department website with extensive resources

name: Mechanical Department
overview: The Mechanical Department, established in 1988, is the largest department at GP Palanpur with 23 faculty members. Offering the Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, the department provides comprehensive education in manufacturing, thermal engineering, and industrial production. The department boasts well-equipped laboratories and strong industry connections.
achievements: NBA Accreditation for Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (Valid till 2027)
Largest faculty strength ensuring quality education

name: Electronics & Communication Department
overview: The Electronics & Communication Department, established in 1994, offers two diploma programs: Electronics & Communication Engineering and Information & Communication Technology. With 8 dedicated faculty members, the department focuses on emerging technologies including IoT, Embedded Systems, VLSI, and networking. The department has a dedicated website showcasing its activities and achievements.
achievements: Offers two modern diploma programs (EC and ICT)
Dedicated department website with comprehensive resources
Focus on emerging technologies and industry 4.0

name: Instrumentation & Control Department
overview: The Instrumentation & Control Department is one of the newest additions to GP Palanpur, established in 2023. The department offers the Diploma in Information Technology program, focusing on software development, web technologies, database management, and IT security. The department is building modern infrastructure and establishing industry partnerships to provide quality education.
achievements: Newest department focusing on IT education
Modern curriculum aligned with industry needs

name: Science & Humanities Department
overview: The Science & Humanities Department is a foundational department that provides essential education across all diploma programs at GP Palanpur. While it doesn't offer any specific diploma program, the department teaches fundamental subjects including Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, English, and Communication Skills to students of all engineering disciplines. The department plays a crucial role in building the scientific and communication foundation necessary for engineering education.
achievements: Essential foundation for all engineering programs
Expert faculty in science and humanities subjects
Strong emphasis on communication and soft skills
